title: Aevum Source Library — passage record
description: One record = one semantically coherent passage (a chapter section, a numbered Consideration, or a single aphorism). This is the unit that gets embedded for retrieval AND keyed for the existing deterministic matcher.

tradition_tag.description: maps to TRADITION_METHODS keys in chat.js: classic|lilly|bonatti|arabic|dorotheus

text.description: VERBATIM passage in `language`. null = not yet extracted.

translation.description: our own EN translation of a non-English `text` (license=our-translation). null for already-English sources.

topics.description: free tags, e.g. via_combusta, moon, dignity, prohibition

condition_keys.description: bridges the deterministic matcher in chat.js (e.g. via_combusta, voc_moon, saturn_7th, retrograde)

_status.description: ingestion bookkeeping; drop before loading to Firestore
